name: Startup India Seed Fund Scheme
description: Seed-fund support for eligible DPIIT-recognised startups to validate ideas, build prototypes, conduct trials, enter markets, and commercialise products.

benefit.amount: Up to INR 20 lakh grant or INR 50 lakh investment support
benefit.description: Support is routed through selected incubators; grants and debt or convertible-instrument support are subject to scheme conditions.

other_conditions: Startup must be DPIIT-recognised, generally incorporated not more than two years before application, and meet innovation and technology-use conditions under the scheme.

benefits.financial: Up to INR 20 lakh grant or INR 50 lakh investment support

ai_explanation.summary: Early-stage funding support for eligible DPIIT-recognised startups through selected incubators.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm DPIIT recognition, incorporation age, innovation focus, and the selected incubator's current application criteria.
tips: Prepare a concise problem statement, prototype plan, and funding-use proposal.
frequently_asked_questions: Is funding paid directly to a startup?
next_steps: Check eligible incubators on the Seed Fund portal.
Submit an application to a suitable incubator.

source.organization: Department for Promotion of Industry and Internal Trade

name: Stand-Up India
description: Bank-loan scheme supporting greenfield enterprises promoted by women and Scheduled Caste or Scheduled Tribe entrepreneurs.

benefit.description: Composite bank loans for eligible greenfield enterprises in manufacturing, services, trading, and allied agriculture activities, subject to bank appraisal.

other_conditions: The borrower must be a woman or SC/ST entrepreneur aged 18 or above and propose a greenfield enterprise; for non-individual entities, eligible promoters must hold at least 51% ownership and control.

application.deadline: Open throughout the year, subject to bank appraisal

benefits.financial: Composite loan from INR 10 lakh to INR 1 crore

ai_metadata.estimated_processing_time: Subject to bank appraisal and documentation

ai_explanation.summary: Bank-loan facilitation for eligible women and SC/ST entrepreneurs launching a greenfield enterprise.
ai_explanation.eligibility_reason_template: Confirm promoter category, enterprise type, ownership structure, and bank documentation requirements.
common_rejection_reasons: Business plan or financial documents incomplete
tips: Prepare realistic project costs and repayment projections before approaching a bank.
next_steps: Prepare a project report and contact a scheduled commercial bank.

source.organization: Department of Financial Services, Ministry of Finance
